A.name: A
A.query: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 1 MINUTE) AS ts, countIf(status_code_string = 'Error') / count() AS value FROM signoz_traces.distributed_signoz_index_v3 WHERE name LIKE 'tool.%' AND `resource_string_service$$name` = 'support-agent' AND timestamp BETWEEN {{.start_datetime}} AND {{.end_datetime}} GROUP BY ts ORDER BY ts

annotations.summary: Support-agent tool failure rate exceeded 50% over the last 5 minutes.
annotations.description: The agent is failing its tool calls. Flight-recorder runbook: grab a failing trace id from SigNoz, replay the counterfactuals with `python -m replay.engine --trace-id <id>`, then run `python -m investigator.investigate --trace-id <id>` (or open the diff UI at http://localhost:5173) to get the root-cause verdict.
